title: Premier Santa and Tree Scene Water Spinner Lantern – 21 cm Antique Gold Christmas Decoration with Warm White LED Lights – Battery Operated Snow Effect Festive Ornament
features: SANTA AND TREE SCENE – Festive water spinner lantern featuring Santa Claus beside a decorated Christmas tree, finished in antique gold
MAGICAL SNOW EFFECT – Glitter swirls automatically inside the lantern, creating a sparkling snowfall effect without shaking
WARM WHITE LED LIGHTS – Illuminates the scene with a soft glow, bringing the festive design to life with warmth and detail
BATTERY OPERATED – Runs on 3 x AA batteries (not included), giving flexibility to display anywhere without wires or sockets
SIZE – 21 cm tall, ideal as a Christmas decoration for mantelpieces, shelves, tables, or windowsills
description: Bring festive magic into your home with the Premier Santa and Tree Scene Water Spinner Lantern. Measuring 21 cm, this charming decoration features a detailed Christmas scene with Santa Claus by a decorated tree, all set within an antique gold lantern frame. The water spinner creates a continuous swirling snow effect with glitter that moves automatically when switched on, adding sparkle and movement to your display. Inside, warm white LED lights softly illuminate the scene, enhancing the details and creating a cosy seasonal glow. Unlike traditional snow globes, this design requires no shaking – the effect runs automatically, making it a delightful and fuss-free decoration. Crafted from plastic, metal, and liquid, the lantern is durable while maintaining an elegant vintage look that blends seamlessly with festive décor. Powered by 3 x AA batteries (not included), it can be placed anywhere in your home without the need for plugs or cables. Perfect for a mantelpiece, windowsill, shelf, or as part of a festive table centrepiece, this water spinner lantern makes a beautiful addition to your seasonal decorations and is also a thoughtful gift idea for family and friends.
